default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, CTAs, and competitive response.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CTA Strategy Shift:** Replace all "Free Trial" CTAs with "Book a Demo" links.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The demo page converts better than the slow-loading trial form, and demos are the primary business goal.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** A major content refresh is planned for Q1 2026 to optimize existing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Actions:** Add TLDRs and FAQs, update messaging, and consolidate/prune articles.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Competitive Response:** Ravenna is copying Siit's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [**Action:** Monitor Ravenna for competitive intelligence and accelerate Siit's own content refresh plans.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy:** Continue Reddit engagement for one more quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The channel drives valuable, untrackable AEO (AI Engine Optimization) and social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Analysis: Ravenna

  - [**Observation:** Competitor Ravenna is replicating Siit's content strategy, including topics and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Analysis:** This is a validation of Siit's strategy. Ravenna is behind on domain authority and volume, and Google rewards first-movers.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Action:** Use Ravenna's blog for competitive intelligence.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Learn from their tactics:** TLDRs and FAQs are effective features to incorporate into Siit's own content.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

### Content Strategy: Refresh & Gap Analysis

  - [**Plan:** A major content refresh will begin in Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Optimize existing assets for faster results by improving content already ranking on pages 1-2.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
          - [Add TLDRs and FAQs to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
          - [Update messaging to align with the new brand architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
          - [Consolidate or prune underperforming articles.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**Gap Analysis:** A new content gap analysis is planned for Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Refresh the initial analysis to account for market shifts (e.g., AI) and new competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### CTA & Video Strategy

  - [**Video Embed:** The YouTube demo video will be embedded directly into content pages.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Placement:** Above the final section on Alternatives pages, between the "why not this tool" and CTA on Reviews pages.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will provide the Vimeo embed link.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**CTA Link Change:** All "Free Trial" CTA buttons will link to the "Book a Demo" page.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The demo page converts better than the slow-loading trial form, and demos are the primary business goal.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will implement this change.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**CTA Copy Refinement:** The CTA copy will be refined to differentiate the embedded video from the live demo.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** Use phrases like "Get a custom demo" or "Book a live demo."](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Reddit Channel Performance

  - [**Challenge:** Reddit engagement is high, but direct traffic is untrackable.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [**Decision:** Continue Reddit activity for one more quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The channel drives valuable, untrackable AEO and social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Action:** Carmel will request a social listening analysis from the Reddit agency to better measure influence.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**Tracking Suggestion:** Ask "How did you hear about us?" at the end of successful demo calls for directional data.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
      - [Implement the "Free Trial" → "Book a Demo" CTA link change.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Provide the Vimeo embed link for the demo video.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Send the integration visuals file to Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Forward the Webflow year-update request to the dev team.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [Request a social listening analysis from the Reddit agency.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [Refine CTA copy to differentiate the embedded video from the live demo.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [Send the Webflow year-update request to Carmel.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Embed the demo video and integration visuals upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Begin scoping the Q1 2026 content refresh and gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/omJCqas86ScXE-JYQKmxVbPb9_B6wz45?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

action_items.description: Upload demo video to Vimeo; send embed link to Matt
Add UTMs to demo CTAs across blog/tools/alternatives/reviews/comparisons
Send integration visuals to Matt; GrowthX embeds in content
Send Webflow footer year update instructions to Carmel; Carmel forwards to dev team
Implement 'How did you hear about us?' on demo calls
Notify Matt when demo CTA updates are live
